ddls:
CREATE TABLE "olive_oils" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each olive oil sample */,
  "area_string" TEXT /* Area where the olive oil was sourced */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the region */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the specific area */,
  "palmitic" REAL /* Percentage of palmitic acid in the olive oil */,
  "palmitoleic" REAL /* Percentage of palmitoleic acid in the olive oil */,
  "stearic" REAL /* Percentage of stearic acid in the olive oil */,
  "oleic" REAL /* Percentage of oleic acid in the olive oil */,
  "linoleic" REAL /* Percentage of linoleic acid in the olive oil */,
  "linolenic" REAL /* Percentage of linolenic acid in the olive oil */,
  "arachidic" REAL /* Percentage of arachidic acid in the olive oil */,
  "eicosenoic" REAL /* Percentage of eicosenoic acid in the olive oil */,
  "region_string" TEXT /* String representation of the region */,
  "harvest_year" INTEGER /* Year the olive oil was harvested */,
  "cultivar" TEXT /* Specific cultivar of olives used */,
  "farmer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the farmer who supplied the olives */,
  "production_batch" TEXT /* Identifier for the production batch */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Overall quality score of the olive oil */,
  "total_acidity" REAL /* Total acidity percentage */,
  "peroxide_value" REAL /* Peroxide value, an indicator of freshness */,
  "k232" REAL /* K232 value, a measure of oxidation */,
  "k270" REAL /* K270 value, another measure of oxidation */,
  "delta_k" REAL /* ΔK value, the difference between K232 and K270 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_olive_oils_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_olive_oils_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_string" TEXT /* String representation of the region */,
  "climate_type" TEXT /* Climate type of the region */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Predominant soil type in the region */,
  "average_rainfall" REAL /* Average annual rainfall in the region */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average annual temperature in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the area belongs to */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Average elevation of the area */,
  "irrigation_type" TEXT /* Type of irrigation used in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fatty_acids" (
  "acid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fatty acid */,
  "acid_name" TEXT /* Name of the fatty acid */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fatty acid */,
  "cas_number" TEXT /* CAS number of the fatty acid */,
  "chemical_formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the fatty acid */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the fatty acid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("acid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., quality control analyst, product developer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the olive oil sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES olive_oils ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the olive oil sample for which the prediction is made */,
  "predicted_quality" REAL /* Predicted quality of the olive oil */,
  "predicted_yield" REAL /* Predicted yield of the olive oil */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for the prediction */,
  "predicted_by" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who made the prediction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES olive_oils ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_predicted_by FOREIGN KEY ("predicted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
